overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat walking through a sterile, futuristic facility. The character moves from an enclosed institutional corridor with propaganda posters into a glass-enclosed walkway revealing an indoor hydroponics garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: sterile institutional corridor with propaganda poster

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward the doorway at the end

notable_agents.action: standing or walking slowly in the distance near the doorway

entered.detail: large yellow wall poster with figures and text reading 'Progress is contagious'
simple metal bench attached to the right wall
white paneled locker or storage unit embedded in the left wall
metal-framed doorway leading to the next section of the facility

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sterile, gray corridor with institutional lighting. A prominent yellow propaganda poster on the right wall displays the message 'Progress is contagious' above a metal bench. The character approaches a doorway at the end of the hall where a distant figure is visible.

events.description: passes through the doorway from the enclosed corridor into a glass-walled walkway revealing indoor vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the greenhouse section, continuing forward along the glass walkway

entered.detail: metal and glass safety railing along the right side of the walkway
dense green plants growing in indoor hydroponic beds visible through the glass
exposed pipes, tanks, and equipment visible through the left glass wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions through the doorway into a glass-enclosed walkway. To the right, a lush hydroponics garden with dense green vegetation is visible behind glass panels, while the left side reveals industrial machinery and piping. The character continues walking through this hybrid space where technology and vegetation coexist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile institutional corridor that opens into a vibrant, glass-enclosed hybrid of technology and nature. It begins by trailing a character in a white coat through a gray hallway under harsh lighting, passing a yellow propaganda poster that reads Progress is contagious. As the character approaches a distant figure, the camera moves through a doorway, transitioning from the enclosed concrete space into a transparent walkway. The scene then expands to reveal a lush hydroponics garden with dense green vegetation behind glass panels on the right, contrasted by industrial machinery and piping on the left. The movement concludes as the character continues forward through this intersection of sterile architecture and thriving greenery.
